description: This file contains Android instrumentation tests for the HistorySerializer component, verifying serialization/deserialization of HistoryEntry objects and handling of invalid input.

classes.name: HistorySerializerAndroidTest
classes.description: Android test class for testing HistorySerializer serialization and deserialization functions.

methods.name: serializeDeserialize_roundTrip_preservesEntries
methods.description: Tests that serializing and then deserializing a list of HistoryEntry objects preserves the data.

methods.name: deserialize_invalidInput_returnsEmpty
methods.description: Tests that deserializing invalid input strings returns an empty list.
